case_title: IAN HARWOOD VS. THE CITISCAPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT GROUP, LLC

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARWOOD, IAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE CITISCAPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT GROUP, LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-10-2025 BY GARRETT L. WONG. PLAINTIFF IAN HARWOOD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE CITISCAPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT GROUP, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NICK BERG AND ADAM STOKES. DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE TO HAVE THIS MATTER HEARD TODAY. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: GARRETT WONG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
